query: INSERT INTO field_inspection_questions (categoryId, questionText, points, maxScore, `order`) VALUES (30001, 'TOASTER TEMİZLİĞİ YETERLİ, TEFLON KULLANIMA UYGUN  ( SÜRE 30 SN / 280 C )', 3, 5, 16); INSERT INTO field_inspection_questions (categoryId, questionText, points, maxScore, `order`) VALUES (30001, 'FRİTÖZ YAĞ SEVİYESİ YETERLİ Mİ ( İKİ ÇİZGİ ARASI ) , TPM DEĞERLERİ UYGUN MU ? ( TPM ÜST SINIR 22 )', 2, 5, 17); INSERT INTO field_inspection_questions (categoryId, questionText, points, maxScore, `order`) VALUES (30001, 'COLESLOVE REÇETEYE GÖRE HAZIRLANMIŞ MI ? SKT ETİKETİ VAR MI ?
